articles.title: Live ISRO news backend is configured
articles.summary: Start the local backend with npm start to pull periodically refreshed ISRO headlines. This local file keeps the news tab populated if the backend or network is unavailable.

articles.title: ISRO panel can track Indian satellites from loaded TLE data
articles.summary: The missions and stats tabs connect ISRO mission cards to satellites currently available in the live or cached satellite catalog.

articles.title: Use the refresh control for live satellite catalog updates
articles.summary: The app first shows cached or bundled satellite data, then refreshes from live CelesTrak sources in the background when available.
